key_insight: A deep learning pipeline can quantify tumor microenvironment features in DLBCL and distinguish GCB from ABC/non-GCB phenotypes based on cell composition and spatial organization.
clinical_relevance: This approach may help refine lymphoma risk stratification beyond the Hans classifier by adding microenvironment context that could support more detailed subtype assessment.
method: Automated analysis of multiplexed tumor images with deep learning
Quantification of cell composition, morphology, and spatial relationships
Comparison of microenvironment features between GCB and ABC tumors
evidence_signal: The abstract reports cohort-level differences, including higher immune cell proportions in ABC tumors and stronger interaction with M2 macrophages.
watch_item: Findings are based on retrospective image analysis from a specific DLBCL cohort, so external validation and standardization are needed before broader use.
paper_title: Characterization of DLBCL cell of origin-phenotypes based on tumor microenvironment features
